personalInfo.name: Divesh Kumawat
personalInfo.title: Cloud & Full-Stack Developer
personalInfo.bio: Cloud and Full-Stack Developer skilled in AWS, serverless architectures, and modern web technologies, with hands-on experience building and deploying scalable AI-powered applications. Experienced in cloud deployment, REST APIs, open-source contribution, and automation with a strong focus on performance, accessibility, and production-ready systems.

experience.title: EPL Open Source Contribution
description: Developed and integrated the official EPL cloud package with AWS support for the EPL ecosystem.
Implemented cloud utilities for AWS S3, Lambda, and SQS integrations.
Designed a simplified EPL facade layer and added modular boto3 support using eplang[cloud].
Created 25 unit tests with mocked AWS services to ensure reliability and high test coverage.
Collaborated using GitHub workflows including feature branching, pull requests, and code reviews.

projects.title: AI-StudyBuddy
description: Built and deployed a full-stack AI-powered learning platform using Angular, Node.js, and Google Gemini API for generating personalized study materials from PDF documents.
Architected and deployed a production-ready two-tier web application on Vercel using custom vercel.json routing and optimized serverless deployment workflows.
Developed scalable AI pipelines for automated PDF text extraction, summaries, flashcards, and quiz generation based on document complexity.
Designed a responsive modern UI with glassmorphism effects, accessibility modes, and text-to-speech support for inclusive learning experiences.
Implemented offline-ready export functionality for flashcards and quizzes to improve accessibility and usability.
projects.architecture: Two-tier web application with Angular frontend and Node.js backend, deployed on Vercel with serverless functions

projects.title: Fun-Facts Generator — AWS Serverless Project
description: Created a fully serverless application using AWS Lambda, API Gateway, DynamoDB, Bedrock, and Amplify to generate AI-powered fun facts.
Built scalable backend APIs and securely managed real-time AI-generated responses using IAM-based access control.
Hosted and deployed the frontend on AWS Amplify to deliver a cloud-native and responsive user experience.
projects.architecture: Serverless architecture with AWS Lambda functions, API Gateway for routing, DynamoDB for storage, and AWS Bedrock for AI generation

projects.title: Secure File Sharing App
description: Developed a secure file sharing application with user authentication and encrypted file storage.
Implemented JWT-based authentication system with password hashing using bcrypt for enhanced security.
Built file upload and download functionality with access control and sharing permissions.
Created a responsive React frontend with modern UI components and real-time file management.
Deployed with MongoDB for user and file metadata storage with proper indexing for performance.
projects.architecture: MERN stack application with JWT authentication, file encryption, and role-based access control
